ESLint configuration for enforcing code style rules in a JavaScript environment.

# Purpose
This configuration file is for ESLint, a tool for identifying and fixing problems in JavaScript code. It specifies the environment settings, enabling support for browser, CommonJS, and ECMAScript 6 features. The file extends the `eslint:recommended` set of rules and customizes specific rules: it enforces a 2-space indentation, Unix-style line breaks, single quotes for strings, and requires semicolons at the end of statements.
